profile.name: Amit Shaw
profile.headline: Digital Marketing Specialist | Meta Ads Expert | Web Developer | AI Researcher
profile.subheadline: I help businesses get more visibility, better leads, and a stronger digital presence through Meta Ads, smart marketing strategy, website development, and AI-powered research.
profile.aboutHtml:
I'm Amit Shaw, a multi-skilled professional focused on business growth through digital strategy and practical execution.

I work across Meta Ads, digital marketing, website development, AI-powered research, and data analysis.

I believe good work should not just look professional, it should deliver clear results.

My approach is simple: understand the problem, build the right solution, and help businesses grow with confidence.

Marketing.label: Marketing
Marketing.description: Campaign planning, social media execution, and digital visibility strategies focused on reach, leads, and brand growth.

Tech.label: Tech
Tech.description: Professional website development, clean responsive layouts, and practical digital experiences that build trust.

Analytics.label: Analytics
Analytics.description: Excel-based analysis, reporting structure, and workflow support that help businesses make better decisions.

AI Tools.label: AI Tools
AI Tools.description: AI-powered research and ChatGPT-assisted workflows for faster insights, smarter planning, and efficient execution.

hero.description: I work with a result-driven mindset, combining digital marketing, Meta Ads, AI-powered research, and professional website development to solve real business problems clearly and effectively.

about.title: Practical Skills Backed By Real Execution
about.description: I help businesses with digital growth, marketing support, website development, and structured business work that improves trust, reach, and day-to-day performance.

services.title: What I Help Businesses Achieve
services.description: Every service is designed around business outcomes: better visibility, cleaner execution, and a more professional online presence.

skills.title: A Multi-Skilled System For Business Growth
skills.description: Marketing, tech, analytics, and AI tools combined into a practical capability stack that supports both visibility and execution.

experience.title: Hands-On Work That Builds Accuracy And Trust
experience.description: My experience combines daily business support, disciplined record handling, and practical execution across both operations and digital work.

projects.title: Case Study Built Around Real Business Value

services.title: Meta Ads Campaign Management
services.description: I create targeted Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns designed to increase reach, generate leads, and improve return on ad spend.

services.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
services.description: I help businesses build clear marketing plans that improve online visibility, audience targeting, and growth direction.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.description: I support brands with better content direction, platform consistency, and audience-focused communication that builds trust.

services.title: Website Development
services.description: I build clean, responsive, and professional websites that improve brand image and make it easier for customers to take action.

services.title: AI-Powered Research Support
services.description: I use AI tools like ChatGPT for fast research, idea generation, content support, and smarter business problem-solving.

services.title: Excel Data Analysis
services.description: I organize and analyze business data in Excel to support reporting, decisions, and better workflow management.

experiences.role: Accounts Executive | Digital Marketer | System Developer
experiences.description: Working across accounts operations, digital marketing support, and system development with a focus on accuracy, business growth, and efficient workflow execution.
Handled pharmacy billing operations, cash transactions, and customer-facing billing processes with practical POS familiarity and steady execution.

projects.title: Hospital Website Development
projects.description: Problem: The hospital had limited online presence and needed a more professional digital identity to build trust and improve patient communication. Solution: I developed a modern, responsive website designed to present the hospital clearly and professionally across desktop and mobile devices, with service pages and an easy contact system. Result: The new website improved the hospital's branding, strengthened credibility, and created a better experience for visitors looking for services and contact details.

achievements.title: Quiz Competition Recognition
achievements.description: Recognized in quiz competitions for knowledge, confidence, and competitive performance.

achievements.title: Fast Learner Recognition
achievements.description: Known for learning tools quickly and adapting across accounting, digital marketing, web development, and AI research workflows.

achievements.title: ADCA Certified
achievements.description: Completed Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications with practical understanding of office tools and workflow support.
